subject: dailycoding 추가 개선: 성능 최적화, 보안 강화, UX 편의성 개선, 디자인 폴리시, 실용 기능 추가 + 테스트/빌드 검증까지 완료
description: dailycoding 추가 개선: 성능 최적화, 보안 강화, UX 편의성 개선, 디자인 폴리시, 실용 기능 추가 + 테스트/빌드 검증까지 완료
result:
Completed focused UX/performance/security improvements for the problems experience.

Changed files:
- dailycoding/src/pages/ProblemsPage.jsx
- dailycoding-server/src/config/redis.js
- dailycoding-server/src/middleware/rateLimit.js
- dailycoding-server/src/middleware/rateLimit.test.js
- dailycoding-server/src/models/Problem.js
- dailycoding-server/src/routes/problems.pagination.test.js
- dailycoding-server/src/index.js

Highlights:
- Problems page now uses URL-synced server pagination/filtering, dynamic tags, remembered view mode, share-link copy, and random-unsolved pick.
- Backend problem sorting now honors newest-first ordering.
- Rate limiter now emits RateLimit/Retry-After metadata and no-store on 429 responses.
- Server now hides the Express x-powered-by header.

Verification:
PASS - cd dailycoding && npm run build
PASS - cd dailycoding-server && node --check src/config/redis.js src/middleware/rateLimit.js src/models/Problem.js src/routes/problems.pagination.test.js src/middleware/rateLimit.test.js src/index.js
PASS - cd dailycoding-server && node --test --test-force-exit src/routes/problems.pagination.test.js src/middleware/rateLimit.test.js (4 pass / 0 fail)
INFO - Frontend build emitted existing CSS minify warnings from pre-existing styles outside this change set.

Note: workspace root is not a git repo, so commit step was skipped per leader guidance.
